title: Giftmaker Metallic Foil Wrapping Paper Rolls in Gold, Silver and Red, 69cm x 1.5m – Glossy Gift Wrap for Holidays, Parties, Birthdays, DIY Crafts & Decorations (3 Rolls)
features: Vibrant Metallic Colours: Rich Gold, Silver, and Red shades for festive and celebratory occasions.
Generous Size: Each roll measures 69cm x 1.5m – ideal for boxes, bottles, and larger gifts.
Glossy Foil Finish: Smooth reflective surface creates a professional, eye-catching look.
Versatile Use: Perfect for birthdays, weddings, parties, holiday décor, and DIY projects. Ideal for scrapbooking, table décor, and creative craft projects.
Eco-Friendly Materials: Paper-based core and packaging are recyclable, supporting sustainability. Flexible, thin paper allows neat folds and crisp edges every time.
description: Elevate every gift and celebration with these metallic foil wrapping paper rolls in classic Gold, Silver, and Red. Measuring 69cm x 1.5m per roll, they provide ample coverage for boxes, bottles, and larger items, while the glossy foil finish adds a reflective, high-end touch. These wraps are not just paper—they are a statement of elegance and care. Perfect for birthdays, weddings, parties, or DIY craft projects, they combine practicality with style. Thin and flexible, they are easy to cut, fold, and shape, ensuring every wrapped gift looks polished and professional. Designed with sustainability in mind, both the paper and core are recyclable, making your celebrations more eco-conscious. Add a pop of shimmer to your décor, enhance your crafts, or simply make every gift shine with this metallic foil wrapping paper set.
